name: Fresh Ichiban Dashi
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3.5 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add a 3-inch square piece of kelp and return to heat.
3. When the mixture boils again, remove the kelp.
4. Stir in 1 cup of preflaked katsuobushi (dried bonito flakes).
5. Turn off the heat.
6. Allow the mixture to sit for two minutes.
7. Strain through cheesecloth.
